title: Geoff Storey
compiled_truth: Geoff Storey is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-16 to 2004-02-04), Geoff Storey sent 174 and received 888 emails, totalling 1062 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gstorey 71](people/gstorey-71-yahoo) (26), [Vickistorey](people/vickistorey-yahoo) (20), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (19), [Vtapia](people/vtapia-pulsar) (13), [Zhiyong Wei](people/zhiyong-wei) (9).
